entries.title: COMMENTARY ON DANIEL 1:18.3 on daniel 13:18
entries.excerpt: Thus here it is symbolized that anyone who wants to partake of the water that flows in the garden must renounce the gate that is wide and enter through the tight and narrow door.

entries.title: COMMENTARY ON DANIEL 1:18.4 on daniel 13:18
entries.excerpt: Thus just as in paradise the devil hid in the snake, also now, hidden in the elders, it has conceived desire in order to corrupt Eve anew.
